_doc: If OUT_NAME is negative, add one PERIOD_EXPR to wrap it into [0, period). Used downstream of edge_delay_avg when the reference edge can be ahead OR behind by less than a period.
name: cycle_wrap_positive

params.doc: Upstream output name (e.g. an edge_delay_avg result).
Period (Cadence expression). The default assumes a 'flo' var holds the frequency; override per project.
